name: Crosslet
description: Slim crosses with a tinted square at every intersection, re-inking on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color0); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 42%; top: 8%; width: 16%; height: 84%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 8%; top: 42%; width: 84%; height: 16%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
